readBackVerification: 28/28 directly fetched after update. Every mapped page contains exactly one CHG19-CONTROL-START/END pair, zero CHG16/CHG17/CHG18 control markers, rehearsal ref bkmfcjzalcvdsdvyxpgi, hosted result 183/183 and explicit local-only Auth/Admin evidence boundaries.
contentHashBasis: Current UTF-8 Markdown body returned by direct Confluence page read-back after CHG-18 update.
repositoryBinding: Confluence body hashes bind the exact current page content to this receipt. CHG-19 application work remains an uncommitted local-only working-tree delta on base db9f8630f21b50ba76455338050dcb1b335b0dac and is not recursively embedded or claimed published.
scope: The 28 active/supporting operational authority pages synchronized by CHG-18. The remaining Confluence pages are historical/domain material governed by DOCS-01 and are not asserted current by this map.
rule: Read the current page before every update and read it back afterwards. Hub and every affected mapped page move under one control package. Preserve concurrent page content by explicit rebase; historical release controls retain released facts and link to current authorities.
